titleStmt.title: SII 10.420: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 420. (A.R. No. 259 of 1924.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE RUINED TEMPLE OF ĀNJANĒYASVĀMI, MUNAGĀLAPALLI, NANDIGAMA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1190 (Vibhava).

summary.p: States that Manuma Chāgirāja, son of Bhīmarāja, made gifts of land to god Bhīmēśvara of Munabalapalli.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśāsanaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1190
Agu nēṁṭi vibhavasaṁvatsaramunaṁdula Uttarā
yana saṁkrāṁttināṁḍu manuma cāgirāju tama tā
ta peddacāgirājunakunu tama māma peddayakunu ta
ma taṁḍri bhīmarājunakuṁ dama talli pāruvatīdēvulakuṁ
buṇyamugānu munabalapalli bhīmēśvaraśrīmahādēvuniki
ṁ beṭṭina vritti ceṁvi raḍḍikuṁṭa yutarana velivolamu kha 3
na 5 pāṭikrēvanu tōṁṭa 1 muppaḷa pōtasamudramu venaka
muṟtutulu 3 Acanapāṭi tōṁṭa 1 pāṭimiṁdi cēnu na 6 ...
dīpanaku . tikkebīḍu sayita mayi na 12 namalikuṁṭa venaka
nu paṭika 1 ṟalacēni puṁḍi . kha 1 . sōmanatadēvaraguḍi yutarana tōṁṭa . 1
ṟalacēni yuttarana na20
kāṁḍrūrinētikūcenaṁgari koḍku marepeddicētaṁ grayamu vi
lcinadi kaṁddirājukuṁṭṭa Uttarapuṁ gomuna na 4 Āmūlyamu veṭṭi
nāṁḍu gajabalamalliraḍḍi bhīmanatadēvaraku peṭṭina vritti . na2
naṁdigāma polāna keluvapedicēta konna kha 1 . muppaḷa polāna peddapaṭimataranaṭapa
lavāricēta konna cēnu na 6-. boḍavarikuṁṭa paḍumaṭa Aimpuripeddicēta konnana 5
lā¨rccenēla tumuṁḍḍi vari na 5
Digital edition of SII 10.420 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
